chapters.title: Welcome to Kotlin
chapters.description: Start your journey into modern Android and backend development with Kotlin! 🚀

chapters.title: Basic Building Blocks
chapters.description: Master variables, data types, and basic operators. The foundation of any app! 🏗️

chapters.title: Control Flow & Logic
chapters.description: Make your code smart with 'if', 'else', and the powerful 'when' expression. 🧠

chapters.title: Loops and Iteration
chapters.description: Write code that repeats effortlessly. Say hello to for-loops, while-loops, and ranges! 🔁

chapters.title: Functions & Actions
chapters.description: Bundle code into reusable blocks. Give your apps superpowers! ⚡

chapters.title: Object-Oriented Programming (Part 1)
chapters.description: Model the real world with Classes and Objects. The magic of OOP begins here! 🎩

chapters.title: Null Safety
chapters.description: Banish NullPointerExceptions forever! Learn Kotlin's signature Null Safety features. 🛡️

chapters.title: Collections & Data
chapters.description: Manage groups of items easily. Arrays, Lists, Maps, and Sets galore! 📚

chapters.title: Lambdas & Higher-Order Functions
chapters.description: Treat functions like data. Unlock the true power of functional programming in Kotlin! ✨

chapters.title: Advanced Features
chapters.description: Master Extension Functions, Data Classes, and an intro to Coroutines! 🎓
